decisions.reasoning: Calyrex-Ice is significantly slower than Urshifu-Rapid and takes heavy damage from its STAB moves. Switching to Incineroar allows me to utilize Intimidate to weaken Urshifu's physical attacks and gain momentum.

Incineroar is threatened with an OHKO by Urshifu-Rapid-Strike's Close Combat. Switching to Flutter Mane provides an immunity to Fighting-type moves, forcing the opponent to switch or risk wasting their turn.
Moonblast is a guaranteed OHKO on Urshifu-Rapid-Strike, and since I outspeed, I can secure the knockout before the opponent can act.
I outspeed Tornadus-Therian and Moonblast is a guaranteed 2HKO, while their attacks cannot OHKO me. Staying in to secure the KO is the optimal play according to the priority list.
I outspeed Tornadus-Therian and Moonblast is a guaranteed 2HKO, whereas their best move against me is a 3HKO. Staying in to secure the KO is the optimal play according to the priority list.
Tornadus-Therian is at 9% HP, which is well within the range for Moonblast to secure a KO. Since I outspeed, I can finish the opponent off this turn.

Flutter Mane is at 22% and will be OHKOed by any of Rillaboom's STAB attacks. Switching to Incineroar provides an Intimidate drop and a resistance to Rillaboom's primary moves, allowing me to survive the turn and maintain momentum.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, fulfilling the primary decision priority of securing a KO when available.
Incineroar has fainted, so I must send in a new Pokemon. Tornadus-Therian is a safe pivot that resists Rillaboom's Wood Hammer and can threaten it with Hurricane or pivot out with U-turn.
Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, fulfilling the primary decision priority to secure the KO immediately.
